india_trends.title: Bajaj Auto Q4 Results: Net profit rises 34% YoY to ₹2,746 crore; ₹150 final dividend announced
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Auto reported a 32% year-on-year revenue increase to ₹16,006 crore for Q4 and the fiscal year ending March 31, driven by robust sales across all segments. EBITDA rose 36% to ₹3,323 crore, while profit after tax reached a record ₹2,746 crore, up 34%.

india_trends.title: India Ratings lifts Syrma SGS to ‘IND AA’; stock hits 52-week high
india_trends.summary: Ind-Ra cited sustains revenue growth and improving profitability as key drivers of the upgrade

india_trends.title: Stock market today (May 6, 2026): Sensex jumps 940 points, Nifty tops 24,300; check top gainers and loser - The Times of India
india_trends.summary: Stock market today (May 6, 2026): Sensex jumps 940 points, Nifty tops 24,300; check top gainers and loser    The Times of India

india_trends.title: Blue Star posts 3.6% revenue growth in FY26, net profit falls on exceptional charges
india_trends.summary: The Mumbai-based air conditioning and refrigeration company recorded its highest-ever quarterly revenue in Q4FY26, with revenue from operations at ₹4,072 crore, up 1.3 per cent year on year

india_trends.title: Sun Pharma, 5 stocks hit 52-week highs, rally up to 25% in a month
india_trends.summary: Sensex surged 940 points as six BSE 100 stocks hit 52-week highs, signalling strong bullish momentum. Stocks like Adani Ports, Nestle India and Sun Pharma led gains, supported by solid monthly performance and positive investor sentiment in a rising market

india_trends.title: PB Fintech Q4 Results: Profit jumps 54% to Rs 261 crore
india_trends.summary: PB Fintech reported a 54% rise in Q4 profit driven by strong insurance premium growth, higher renewal income and steady lending momentum. Revenue surged, margins improved, and full-year performance remained robust with significant expansion across core and new business segments

india_trends.title: Shree Cement Q4 results: Cons PAT falls 8% YoY to Rs 526 cr despite 10% revenue uptick. Rs 70/share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Cement maker Shree Cement reported an 8% YoY drop in Q4 consolidated PAT to Rs 526 crore, even as revenue rose 10% to Rs 6,101 crore. The board declared a Rs 70/share dividend. Strong volume growth and expanding RMC operations supported sequential improvement in profitability.

india_trends.title: India should adopt dual-track trade strategy at WTO, say experts
india_trends.summary: Experts suggest India adopt a dual-track trade strategy. This involves defending World Trade Organisation rules while selectively joining plurilateral talks. Such initiatives shape global trade. India has concerns about plurilateral agreements weakening the multilateral system. However, recalibratin

india_trends.title: Polycab posts record FY26 revenue of ₹289 billion, stock rises 0.94%
india_trends.summary: Profit after tax rose 32% to ₹27,084 million, while EBITDA grew 35% to ₹40,057 million, with margins expanding to 13.9%

india_trends.title: Godrej Properties to expand premium real estate footprint
india_trends.summary: The real estate developer has lined up high-value projects across Gurugram, Delhi and Mumbai as premium housing demand strengthens.

india_trends.title: US stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures jump on rising US-Iran peace hopes; AMD soars 18%
india_trends.summary: US stock futures rose sharply on May 6 as oil prices fell amid reports of a potential US-Iran agreement to end the war in the Middle East. The S&amp;P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures gained 1% and 1.6%, respectively, as optimism grew around the negotiations.

india_trends.title: Son rise at Sun: Decoding the architecture of Dilip Shanghvi’s global empire
india_trends.summary: With a bold $11.75 billion bet on Organon, Dilip Shanghvi is hedging a decade of US stagnation and quietly commissioning an empire for a son who would rather let the numbers do the talking.

india_trends.title: South Indian Bank Q4 profit rises 19% to Rs 408 crore as provisions decline
india_trends.summary: South Indian Bank posted 19% profit growth in Q4 driven by sharply lower provisions despite weaker operating profit and other income. Asset quality improved significantly, while advances and deposits saw healthy growth, supporting overall performance and boosting investor sentiment during the quarte

india_trends.title: Marico eyes ₹20k cr revenue by FY30, bets on new growth levers
india_trends.summary: Marico is targeting ₹15,000 crore revenue by FY27 and ₹20,000 crore by FY30, driven by premiumisation, packaged foods, and global expansion. Strong volume growth, wellness trends, and digital-led plays in markets like Vietnam are key to its next phase of growth.

india_trends.title: India, South Korea likely to hold FTA review talks on May 25
india_trends.summary: India and South Korea will meet on May 25 to review their economic partnership agreement. India has proposed negotiating a new bilateral trade agreement. This aims to address the widening trade deficit. The two nations seek to double their commerce by 2030. They also want a more balanced trade relat

india_trends.title: India's overall exports hit all-time high of $863 billion in FY26
india_trends.summary: India's total exports hit a record $863.11 billion in the last fiscal year. Services exports alone reached $421.32 billion, showing significant growth. Merchandise exports also saw an increase. This performance highlights India's strong export capabilities despite global challenges. The country achi

Mindspace REIT raises Rs 500 cr through 10-year NCD issue
india_trends.summary: Mindspace Business Parks REIT raised Rs 500 crore through 10-year NCDs at 7.63% coupon, fully subscribed by an insurer. Funds will refinance debt, enhance cost predictability and support long-term stability, backed by strong credit ratings and diversified investor participation across instruments

india_trends.title: Beer makers say costs are bubbling over as glass supply tightens the pour
india_trends.summary: As the beer industry experiences a surge in demand, producers are encountering significant challenges, primarily due to rising production costs and limited glass bottle availability. In light of these hurdles, industry players are lobbying state governments for a substantial 15-20% increase in beer

ADP says businesses create the most new jobs in 15 months. Labor market might be thawing.
world_trends.summary: ADP said U.S. businesses create 109,000 new jobs in April — the biggest increase in 15 months — in a sign a partly frozen labor market might be thawing out after a prolonged bout of tepid hiring.
